CustomField.formula: IF(AND(NATT_Latest_Requested_Ship_Date__c < TODAY(), TEXT(SBQQ__Status__c) = 'Draft', TEXT(SBQQ__Type__c) = 'Quote'), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "", 15, 15) & " There's a requested ship date in the past.", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "", 15, 15))
CustomField.label: Requested Ship Date Error
